## Quality Gate Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt-check` passes
- [ ] `make clippy` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `make test` passes (`cargo test --workspace --all-features`)
- [ ] `make audit` / `make deny` pass, or new findings are justified below
- [ ] Docs updated (README / DEVELOPMENT.md / docs/) if behavior changed
- [ ] No breaking API change, or it is called out with a migration note
